title: Yesn't mod
description: A mod that adds a new dimension with 2 new biomes, ores, tools, armor and food. Made as a joke.
body:
This mod adds 3 materials, those being yes (ore, ingot, tools and armor) ,no (ore, ingot, tools and armor) and yesn't (ingot, tools and armor), it also adds "yes fries" ,yes / no hamburgers and a new dimension with 2 new biomes.

The fries and hamburgers are crafted, yes ores are found in the yes biome and no ores are found in the no biome, they are extremely rare.

The yes and no biomes are found in the yesn't dimension, the portal has a glowstone frame and is ignited with a "yignoter" (might not be available to get in survival, i have not tested the mod in survival)

There is a new advancement tab

Yesn't ingots are crafted with yes and no ingots. **(Be aware that equiping yesn't armor currently playes the ender dragons death sound)**

**This mod was made as a joke, feel free to add it to any modpack.**


This mod will not really affect your gameplay unless someone gets a tool or piece of armor from the mod

 

 

**Have fun!**
